user_query:
I’m prepping a mixed Irish round for my pub quiz in Dublin and want to build it from my own notes. Using the local inputs listed below, please do the following and keep everything deterministic:

Inputs you must use:
- data/irish_authors.html (HTML with a table of authors and works)
- data/gaelic_sports.md (Markdown bullet list of GAA highlights)
- docs/round_template.md (handout template with markers)
- config/quiz.yaml (site/rounds config)

Tasks and outputs:
1) Extract structured data from both sources to create exactly 10 question–answer pairs:
   - From data/irish_authors.html, read the table with id="authors" and take the first five rows in the order they appear. For each, produce a Literature question of the form: Who wrote 'WORK'? The answer is the Author from that row. (Use the Work field exactly as it appears in the table.)
   - From data/gaelic_sports.md, parse the first five bullet lines in the order they appear. Each line encodes Year, Event, Winner. For each, produce a Sports question of the form: Who won the EVENT in YEAR? The answer is the Winner from that line.
   Save the 10 items (first the five Literature ones, then the five Sports ones) to out/irish_mix_questions.csv with these columns and order: category,question,answer,source. Set category to either Literature or Sports, and set source to the input file path you derived it from (either data/irish_authors.html or data/gaelic_sports.md).

2) Create a handout from the template by rewriting it. Read docs/round_template.md, replace the content strictly between the markers <!-- BEGIN QUESTIONS --> and <!-- END QUESTIONS --> with a numbered list of Q1–Q10 containing only the question text (no answers). Do not change any other part of the template. Write the populated handout to docs/rounds/irish-mix-2026-04.md (leave docs/round_template.md unchanged).

3) Modify the configuration to register the new round. Open config/quiz.yaml and append a new entry under rounds with the following exact keys/values:
   - slug: "irish-mix-2026-04"
   - title: "Round: Irish Mix (Literature & GAA)"
   - date: "2026-04-17"
   - source_csv: "out/irish_mix_questions.csv"
   - handout_md: "docs/rounds/irish-mix-2026-04.md"
   Keep the existing content intact and ensure the resulting YAML is valid.

Constraints:
- Use only the provided input files; no external lookups.
- Follow the specified question templates exactly and the prescribed ordering (Literature first, then Sports).
- Ensure all specified output paths exist and are written.

Deliverables expected in the workspace:
- out/irish_mix_questions.csv (10 rows with the specified columns)
- docs/rounds/irish-mix-2026-04.md (template rewritten only between the markers)
- config/quiz.yaml updated with the new round entry All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
